---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new project feature
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should this feature make possible?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the behavior.

## Why it matters

Explain how it helps the research loop or downstream loops.

## Acceptance checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs added or updated
- [ ] CLI/API impact described
